core_mechanism: a diffusion (Fickian) transport process whose frequency-dependent linear response yields a power-law (1/f) power spectrum, derived by coarse-graining microscopic field equations into an effective-medium description with frequency-dependent transport coefficients
brief_reason: The abstract starts from Maxwell's equations, builds a macroscopic effective-medium formalism, and attributes both the observed frequency-dependent conductivity/permittivity and the 1/f power-spectral scaling to ionic diffusion dominating over direct electric-field effects.
